parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 17px;"><b>Output Redirection</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="185" x="2807.5" y="8650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=none;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>syntax:</b> &gt; file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">Overwrite stdout to file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>usecase: </b>save output</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="250" x="2807.5" y="8690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=none;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>syntax:</b> &gt;&gt; file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">Append stdout to file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>usecase: </b>accumulate logs</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="250" x="3080" y="8690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=none;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>syntax:</b>&nbsp;2&gt; file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">Redirect stderr to file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>usecase: </b>capture errors</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="250" x="3350" y="8690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=none;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>syntax:</b>&nbsp;2&gt;&amp;1</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">Redirect stderr to stdout</font></div><div><b style="font-size: 16px; font-family: Verdana; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">usecase: </b><span style="font-size: 16px; font-family: Verdana; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">combine streams</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="250" x="3620" y="8690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=3;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="290" x="2790" y="8860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 17px;"><b>Input Redirection</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="172.5" x="2807.5" y="8880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=none;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>syntax:</b>&nbsp;&lt; file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">Read stdin from file</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>usecase: </b>feed file data</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="250" x="2807.5" y="8920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=3;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="315" x="3175" y="8860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 17px;"><b>Pipes</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="60" x="3192.5" y="8880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#b0e3e6;strokeColor=none;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>syntax:</b>&nbsp;| command</font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Connect stdout to next stdin</span></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>usecase: </b>chain commands</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="277.5" x="3192.5" y="8920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=3;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="315" x="3575" y="8860" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font face="Verdana" style="font-size: 17px;"><b>Tee</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="52.5" x="3592.5" y="8880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;arcSize=5;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=none;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>syntax: </b>tee file</font></div><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">Split to both stdout and file</span></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana"><b>usecase: </b>save + display</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="277.5" x="3592.5" y="8920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
